details.error_message: It appears that an unexpected issue has occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later or refresh the page. If the problem persists, feel free to contact our support team for assistance.
key_findings: APF NDJSON exact format causes ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR at protocol level
Mistral frontend catches the error and displays built-in error UI (Error 6002)
Error UI is VISIBLE to user unlike previous silent block tests (#317-319)
No APF redirect occurred - Mistral's own error handler produced the message
Retry button is shown but would likely trigger same APF block again
This is a significant improvement over silent block - user sees SOMETHING went wrong

comparison_with_previous.322_ndjson_exact: VISIBLE_ERROR - Error 6002 displayed with retry button

recommendation: NDJSON exact format approach triggers HTTP/2 protocol error which Mistral's error handler catches and displays. This is the most promising approach so far. Next step: investigate if APF can inject custom warning text into the error response, or if a different NDJSON payload can make the assistant message render instead of triggering protocol error.
